signal_title: FTC's Initiative to Modernize Digital Advertising Guidance
risk_rationale: The FTC's initiative to modernize digital advertising guidance could introduce new compliance requirements for sponsored content and advertising practices on social media, which may impact TikTok's current advertising policies, particularly around influencer disclosures and ad transparency.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Mandatory #ad labeling for influencer disclosure for minors
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Enhanced disclosure requirements for sponsored content on social media
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The new FTC guidance may require more stringent or additional disclosure mechanisms beyond the current #ad labeling to prevent digital deception.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Real-time 'sponsored' overlay for live commerce disclosures
compliance_gaps.regulatory_requirement: Enhanced transparency for advertising in games and virtual reality
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The guidance may require additional transparency measures for ads in interactive environments, which could affect TikTok's live commerce features.

remediations.title: Enhance Sponsored Content Disclosure Mechanisms
remediations.description: Develop and implement more robust disclosure mechanisms for sponsored content, potentially including new labeling or notification systems that align with FTC's updated guidance.
acceptance_criteria: New disclosure mechanisms are implemented and tested
Compliance with FTC's updated guidance is verified

remediations.title: Improve Transparency in Interactive Advertising
remediations.description: Review and enhance transparency measures for advertising in interactive environments such as games and virtual reality, ensuring compliance with potential new FTC requirements.
acceptance_criteria: Compliance with FTC's updated guidance is verified

business_impact: Potential changes in advertising practices could affect revenue streams from influencer and interactive advertising if not compliant with new FTC guidelines.
recommended_actions: Monitor FTC's guidance updates and public input process
Engage with legal and policy teams to assess detailed compliance requirements
Prepare to update advertising policies and features to align with new regulations
